title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Whirlpool India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Whirlpool India
jsonLd.description:
Whirlpool India has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Whirlpool India:
Whirlpool India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Whirlpool India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
